case_title: ELSMERE APARTMENTS vs. WILLIAMS, MICKIE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELSMERE APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MICKIE PRITCHETT, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS ST, #106 S.F.
